# Jacob Yi

> Personal site and portfolio of Jacob Yi — software engineer and commodity broker. The site also offers a service: fast, modern websites and local + AI search visibility for criminal-defense law firms.

Jacob Yi describes himself as Christian, Contrarian, Stoic. The site combines a personal portfolio (writing, work, projects) with a productized service for criminal-defense firms who want to show up when someone searches for a lawyer.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://jacobyi.info): Landing page and overview.
- [About](https://jacobyi.info/about): Background on Jacob Yi.
- [Work](https://jacobyi.info/work): Portfolio of projects and case studies.
- [Blog](https://jacobyi.info/blog): Articles and writing.
- [Contact](https://jacobyi.info/contact): How to get in touch.

## Services

- [Criminal Defense Law Firm Websites & SEO](https://jacobyi.info/criminal-defense-websites): Fast, modern websites and local + AI search visibility for criminal-defense firms — so you show up when someone needs you and picks up the phone.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://jacobyi.info/sitemap.xml): Full list of indexable URLs, including individual blog posts and work items.
